internal_issues.description: TRIPLE-DUPLICATED PARAGRAPH: 'A dome defender might reinterpret the CMB as thermal emission from the firmament itself at 2.725 K' appears three times in WIN-048 detail_evidence due to apply-patches.js concatenation bug during expansion integration.

suggested_patch.find: [two trailing duplicate instances of the dome-defender paragraph]
suggested_patch.replace: [empty — removes trailing duplicates, leaves one instance]

internal_issues.description: code_analysis.relabels_standard was TRUE for WIN-048 (CMB Axis of Evil). The Axis of Evil is an unexplained anomaly, not a standard physics explanation being relabeled. This is 'anomaly hijacking,' distinct from relabeling. Inflated Part 4.6 statistics. Curmudgeon Cycle 1 identified this; Cycle 2 confirmed it was never corrected.

WIN-043 detail_evidence noted epoch-dependency of the 2.26x ratio but lacked a concrete cross-check. Computing 1990-2025 displacement from NOAA NP.xy yields a ratio far larger than 2.26x, proving epoch-specificity.

suggested_patch.find: the dome does not specify the time window...

internal_issues.description: SECTIONS.JSON NOT INJECTED: generate-html.js checks SECTIONS_AVAILABLE before calling loadSectionsCache(), but SECTIONS_AVAILABLE is set inside the same conditional block — circular dependency means sections.json is NEVER injected. One-line fix: move loadSectionsCache() call before the SECTIONS_AVAILABLE check.
DOCX MISSING SECTIONS 5.14-5.16: build-doc-v4.js completely omits sections 5.14 (Eclipse Kill-Shot), 5.15 (Code Analysis summary), 5.16 (AI Review). Added in HTML but not DOCX.
DOCX Self-Contradicted count hardcoded as 11 in build-doc-v4.js (now 13). DOCX will show wrong count until manually updated.
KILLSHOT-GAIA missing from DOCX/PDF: Section 4.3 (Gaia parallax kill-shot) appears in HTML but not DOCX. DOCX omits this strongest evidence section.
VERDICT CATEGORY OVERLOAD: 'Misleading' verdict conflates 4 distinct failure modes. Structural taxonomy decision needed.
INCONSISTENT VERDICT BOUNDARY: WIN-043 and WIN-060 classified 'Std Model Explains' but findings describe trivial/duplicate patterns closer to 'Misleading'. Verdict boundary clarification needed.

HOL-HIERARCHY: Argument hierarchy inverted for persuasive framing. Self-contradictions should appear before external tests. EXP-011 complete but targets generate-html.js (infrastructure, requires human to apply 6 edits).
WIN-057 and WIN-058 conflated in build-doc-v4.js. DOCX issue only.
Section numbering mismatch between HTML and DOCX in Part 4.5. DOCX issue.
Framing inconsistency between HTML and DOCX for WIN-056.
SEC-6.2 DOCX cross-reference error: references 'Part 3.1' instead of correct section.

patches_self_applied.notes: All 3 patches applied cleanly. Committed locally (a260766). Push to GitHub pending (no credentials in this session).

recommended_actions.action: Fix SECTIONS_AVAILABLE bug in generate-html.js (ISS-454): change line ~1777 from 'if (SECTIONS_AVAILABLE) { const sections = loadSectionsCache();' to 'const sections = loadSectionsCache(); if (sections) {' — this unlocks all sections.json prose injection

Apply EXP-011 tab ordering edits to generate-html.js (ISS-453): 6 edits to put Self-Contradictions (selftest) before External Tests (falsify). Expansion output in monitor/analyst/expansions/EXP-011-tab-ordering.json

Update build-doc-v4.js to fix DOCX parity issues: add missing sections 5.14-5.16, fix Self-Contradicted count (11→13), add Gaia kill-shot section, fix WIN-057/058 conflation, fix Part 4.5 section numbering (ISS-422, 427, 440, 383, 414, 370, 432)
Push git commit a260766 to GitHub from a session with credentials — patches (WIN-048 dedup, WIN-048 relabels_standard fix, WIN-043 cross-check) are committed locally but not pushed
